params.deviceId: Off-chain identifier (MAC address hash, device fingerprint)

params.user: Wallet address of the session owner

returns.expiresAt: Unix timestamp of expiry (0 if not active)

params.deviceId: The device to extend access for
Off-chain device identifier (keccak256 of MAC or fingerprint)

returns.remainingSeconds: Remaining access time (0 if expired or not found)

AccessExtended(address,bytes32,uint256,u.notice: Emitted when a session is extended

AccessGranted(address,bytes32,uint256,ui.notice: Emitted when a new access session is granted

AccessRevoked(address,bytes32).notice: Emitted when a session is explicitly revoked by the owner

EmergencyPause(bool).notice: Emitted when the contract is paused/unpaused

TierUpdated(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Emitted when a pricing tier is created or updated

Withdrawn(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when accumulated ETH is withdrawn

checkAccess(address,bytes32).notice: Check if a device currently has valid access

remainingTime(address,bytes32).notice: Returns remaining seconds of access for a device

revokeAccess(address,bytes32).notice: Revoke access for a device (owner only, emergency use)

userdoc.notice: Interface for the time-boxed access gateway protocol
